docs:
# Gradient Text
Animated gradient typography for large headlines and accents.
## Import
```tsx
import { GradientText } from "@/components/ui/gradient-text";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<GradientText animate shimmerWidth={undefined}>Aurora gradient</GradientText>
```
## Props
- **label** (string) — default: `"Aurora gradient"`: Text
- **animate** (boolean) — default: `true`: Animate
- **label** (string) — default: `"Aurora gradient"`: Text
- **shimmerWidth** (number): Shimmer width
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add gradient-text
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/gradient-text
```
